name: network-state-closeout
description: Initialize a private global network-state skill with consent-based discovery, maintain categorized cards with progressive loading, and optionally synchronize it across devices through GitHub private repositories.

interface.shortDescription: Maintain private network facts and evidence-backed closeout cards.
interface.longDescription: Create a private global network-state skill in the active Codex cache, ask before discovering local SSH, Docker, reverse-proxy, virtual-network, and VPS structure, load only relevant cards, optionally synchronize through a GitHub private repository, and create status or process cards only when each is independently justified by lasting value and reliable evidence.
defaultPrompt: Use $initialize-network-state to explain the privacy boundary, ask for consent, and initialize my private network-state skill from approved local read-only sources.
Use $initialize-network-state to help another device clone my GitHub private skill repository into its Codex skills cache.
Use $network-state to read only relevant cards and save confirmed updates locally without network synchronization.
Use $network-state to run the GitHub private synchronization gate and publish confirmed updates.
Use $action-closeout-cards to decide whether this completed action needs a status card, a process card, both, or neither; never reconstruct an unrecorded process.
